description_long: This is a modern grave monument set on a rectangular stone base, featuring a two-tone upright headstone with a distinctive split design. The left side of the headstone is made of polished black stone, while the right side is a lighter gray stone, both with smooth, flat surfaces. The headstone is inscribed with text and a small cross, and the grave is bordered by a raised stone frame that matches the lighter stone of the headstone. The grave cover is a flat, rectangular slab of the same light gray stone, slightly elevated above the base. The entire structure rests on a larger, rougher stone platform that serves as the foundation. The monument's clean lines and contrasting colors give it a contemporary appearance, while the materials and inscriptions reflect traditional graveyard elements.
description: A modern grave monument with a split black and gray headstone, inscribed and set on a raised stone base with a flat grave cover.
description_view_0: Front view showing the split black and gray headstone and the rectangular stone base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the headstone and the layered stone grave cover.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inscriptions and cross on the headstone, as well as the full length of the grave cover.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the headstone and the layered construction of the grave.
